creator: lehmannwer@gmail.com
text: I have the same problem after a fresh install of i386 FreeBSD 12.0 on an Aspire 5610 (Nvidia Geforce Go 7300) with nvidia-driver-304 and Firefox and Seamonkey. Opera works though and no other problems with any other software so far. Kodi works, which is most important to me. Everything installed from packages just a few days ago.
